description: 子代理命令 - /focus 聚焦操作

replacements.\"Usage: /focus <subagent-label|session-: "用法：/focus <子代理标签|会话键|会话ID|会话标签>"
replacements.`⚠️ Only ${boundBy} can refocus this con: `⚠️ 只有 ${boundBy} 可以重新聚焦此对话。`
replacements.\"⚠️ Conversation bindings are unavailab: "⚠️ 此账户不支持对话绑定。"
replacements.`created child conversation ${binding.co: `创建了子对话 ${binding.conversation.conversationId} 并绑定到 ${binding.targetSessionKey}`
replacements.\"⚠️ Failed to bind this conversation to: "⚠️ 无法将此对话绑定到目标会话。"
